text: <par>Loan from Tibetan, cf. Tibetan (Amdo:Blabrang) ti tshol khor lo 'wristwatch'.</par>
<par>Loan from Chinese, cf. Chinese hǎijiāo 海椒 'sea (foreign) pepper' or perhaps hǎizǐ 海子 'sea (foreign) -nom'.</par>
<par>Loan from Tibetan, cf. Written Tibetan rgjal khab .</par>
<par>Borrowing from Chinese, cf. Chinese 洋芋	yángyù 'potato'.</par>
